title: Face mask
abstract: Face mask devices, systems, and methods of use include a frame that holds a suitable filter material, including a face mask, over the user's face to form a seal and prevent unfiltered air from being inhaled through the nose or mouth of the user without first passing through the filter material. The frame is removably attached over the user's face by, for example, adjustable straps. The frame may be adjustable in size to be suitable for use on user's having different facial sizes, shapes, and/or geometries.
claims:
Claims 1. A face mask device comprising: a frame configured to be worn on a user's face; and one or more straps configured to be attached to the frame for applying a tension force to the frame to press the frame against a surface of the userГўВҖВҷs face over which the frame is positioned; wherein the frame is configured, due to the tension force exerted by the one or more straps, to flex and/or conform to the surface of the userГўВҖВҷs face with which the frame is in contact; and wherein the frame is configured to secure a filter material against the surface of the userГўВҖВҷs face to prevent unfiltered air from being inhaled by the user without passing through the filter material. 2. The face mask device of claim 1 , wherein the face mask device is configured, in a region over which the frame is adjacent to the userГўВҖВҷs face, to press the filter material against the userГўВҖВҷs face to form a substantially continuous contact area around the user's nose and mouth to prevent air from being inhaled by the user without passing through the filter material. 3. The face mask device of claim 2, wherein the filter material is configured to filter air inhaled by the user as the air passes through the filter material. 4. The face mask of claim 3, wherein the filter material comprises a high performance filtration material. 5. The face mask device of claim 1 , comprising one or more tabs on the frame, the one or more tabs being configured for attachment to one of the one or more straps. 6. The face mask device of claim 5, wherein the one or more tabs is at least two tabs, arranged in pairs on opposing lateral sides of the face mask, and each of the one or more straps is configured to pass around a userГўВҖВҷs head for 

connection to one of the at least two tabs on a first lateral side of the frame and to another of the at least two tabs on a second lateral side of the frame, the first lateral side of the frame being opposite that of the second lateral side, to secure the face mask device to the user's face. 7. The face mask device of claim 5, wherein the one or more tabs is at least two tabs, arranged in pairs on opposing lateral sides of the face mask, and each of the one or more straps is configured to pass around an ear of the user for connection between the at least two tabs on a same lateral side of the frame to secure the face mask device to the user's face. 8. The face mask device of claim 1 , wherein the frame comprises an upper portion, configured to be positioned around the userГўВҖВҷs nose and over a bridge of the userГўВҖВҷs nose, and a lower portion, which is attached to the upper portion and is configured to form a perimeter around the userГўВҖВҷs mouth, wherein the lower portion is substantially circular, oval shaped, and/or oblong. 9. The face mask device of claim 8, wherein the upper portion and/or the lower portion comprise indentions and contours configured to have a substantially similar shape as a shape of the userГўВҖВҷs face. 10. The face mask device of claim 8, wherein the lower portion comprises a protruding portion that extends at an angle away from a direction of extension of a remainder of the lower portion, the protruding portion being configured to be positioned under the userГўВҖВҷs chin to secure the frame under the userГўВҖВҷs chin. 11. The face mask device of claim 10, wherein the frame comprises a rigid material, a semi-rigid material, a flexible material, a thermoforming material, and/or an elastic material. 12. The face mask device of claim 11 , wherein the upper portion comprises metal material, the lower portion comprises a plastic material, and the protruding portion comprises the elastic material. 13. The face mask device of claim 8, comprising a nose bridge attachment that is fixed or adjustable over a nose bridge of the userГўВҖВҷs face. 14. The face mask device of claim 13, wherein the nose bridge attachment is integrated into, or formed in a single piece with, the upper portion of the frame. 15. The face mask device of claim 8, comprising, extending from the upper portion and/or the lower portion of the frame, protrusions configured to press the filter material against the userГўВҖВҷs face to accommodate varying facial geometry of the user. 16. The face mask device of claim 8, wherein the upper portion and/or the lower portion are configured to have an adjustable size to fit any of a plurality of facial sizes and/or geometries. 17. The face mask device of claim 1 , wherein the frame is configured to attach the filter material to the frame. 18. The face mask device of claim 1 , comprising a cover that at least partially covers the frame. 19. The face mask device of claim 18, wherein the cover is a conformal coating. 20. The face mask device of claim 18 or 19, wherein the cover comprises a different material from a material that forms the frame. 21. The face mask of claim 20, wherein the cover comprises a hydrogel or silicone material. 22. The face mask device of claim 1 , wherein the frame comprises one or more clips configured to accept, hold, secure, and/or position an eye/face shield/splash guard over the userГўВҖВҷs face. 23. The face mask device of claim 22, wherein the clip is configured to accept, hold, secure, and/or position googles and/or eyewear over a userГўВҖВҷs face. 24. The face mask of claim 23, wherein the eye/face shield/splash guard can be used alone and/or in conjunction with the filter material. 25. The face mask device of claim 1 , wherein the frame is configured to fit and/or secure a face mask thereto. 26. The face mask device of claim 1 , wherein the frame is configured for folding to reduce a size thereof when not being worn by the user. 27. The face mask device of claim 1 , wherein at least a portion of the frame comprises anisotropic mechanical properties. 28. The face mask device of claim 1 , wherein the filter material is selected from surgical masks, surgical masks with eye shields pre-attached, earloop masks, duckbill masks, cloth material, bandana material, fabric material, filtration material, N95, N99, N100, P95, P99, P100, KN95, FFP3,2,1 , and/or custom or non standard masks. 29. The face mask device of claim 1 , wherein at least a portion of the frame is made from a thermoforming plastic that can be shaped to form a custom fit against a surface of an individual userГўВҖВҷs head. 30. The face mask device of claim 1 , wherein fogging of eyewear worn by a user is prevented due to the frame and filter material forming a seal against the surface of the userГўВҖВҷs face at least adjacent to and/or around the userГўВҖВҷs nose. 31 . The face mask device of claim 1 , wherein at least a portion of the face mask device comprises a surface onto which a decorative design can be provided. 32. A face mask system comprising a face mask device of one of claims 1-31 and one or more filter materials. 33. The face mask system of claim 32, wherein the face mask device is reusable and the one or more filter materials are disposable. 34. The face mask system of claim 32, wherein at least one filter material comprises an inner cover and an outer cover that are attached to each other to form a pocket and wherein the face mask device is configured for insertion within the pocket to secure the filter material over and about the userГўВҖВҷs mouth and nose. 35. The face mask system of claim 32, wherein the one or more straps are configured to be attached to one of a plurality of tabs on opposing lateral sides of the frame of the face mask device to secure the face mask device over the userГўВҖВҷs face. 36. The face mask system of claim 35, wherein the one or more straps are removably attached to the frame of the face mask device. 37. The face mask system of claim 35, wherein the one or more straps are integrally formed with the frame of the face mask device. 38. The face mask system of claim 35, wherein the one or more straps are formed as a single piece with the frame of the face mask device. 39. A method of protecting a subject from exposure to a pathogen or airborne substance, the method comprising providing a subject and applying to the subjectГўВҖВҷs face a face mask device of any of claims 1-30 along with a filter material.
